API Reference

# Get Token Price

This API returns the price of a token on a specific chain.

GET

https://api.relay.linkhttps://api.testnets.relay.link

/

currencies

/

token

/

price

Try it

cURL

cURL

Copy

Ask AI

```
curl --request GET \
  --url https://api.relay.link/currencies/token/price
```

200

400

Copy

Ask AI

```
{
  "price": 123
}
```

#### Query Parameters

[​

](#parameter-address)

address

string

required

Token address to get price for

[​

](#parameter-chain-id)

chainId

number

required

Chain ID of the token

#### Response

200

application/json

Default Response

[​

](#response-price)

price

number

Token price in USD
